\tzpentry{ID5086}{Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5086 introduces Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\\Delta E = \\frac{(\\Phi_0)^2}{2L} \\approx \\frac{(2.07 \\times 10^{-15})^2}{2 \\times 10^{-9}} \\approx 10^{-21} \\, \\text{J}$$
